title: netbox-database plugin
description: Native NetBox SoT for database server instances, tuned config, logical DB/user/grant objects, and engine-native HA (Galera; Patroni/repmgr/streaming). Composes netbox-services (FKs ServiceInstance; reuses HAMirror). Baseline scaffold + full spec is committed and py_compile-clean; the items below are the deep work owed against a live NetBox.

phases.title: Live-NetBox verification
phases.exit_criteria: makemigrations --check --dry-run reports no changes and the full test suite is green on the pinned NetBox 4.6.

items.description: Run `python manage.py makemigrations netbox_database --check --dry-run` on an ephemeral NetBox 4.6; confirm the hand-authored 0001_initial matches the models (FK targets dcim.device / virtualization.virtualmachine / netbox_services.serviceinstance serialize, dependencies resolve).
`python /opt/netbox/app/netbox/manage.py test netbox_database --keepdb -v2` green: models (clean() host-XOR + engine-family gates, uniqueness, cascade), api (CRUD mixins), filtersets.

Confirm `netbox_services.api.serializers.ServiceInstanceSerializer` import path resolves at runtime under the deployed netbox-services wheel; adjust the nested serializer import if the sibling renames it.

phases.title: Deploy + backfill
phases.exit_criteria: Plugin is installed as a wheel on prod + dev NetBox, migrated, granted, and the existing database servers are represented natively.

items.description: Build + `uv pip install --no-deps --reinstall` the wheel into the NetBox venv (prod pct 74234, dev pct 92254), migrate netbox_database, restart once, and scope an ObjectPermission grant so the new models are not 403 (the netbox-system-services deploy pattern).

Populate DatabaseServer + MariaDBConfig/PostgresConfig from the real deployments the ansible mariadb/postgresql playbooks produced (engine, version, port, listen_address, data_dir, on_zfs, and the tuned knobs actually set) and link each to its netbox_services.ServiceInstance where one exists.

phases.title: Seeder + consumer wiring
phases.exit_criteria: An idempotent seeder loads database intent into NetBox and the tofu providers read it as SoT.

items.description: Idempotent upsert seeder (the netbox-seeder pattern) for DatabaseServer/config/Database/DatabaseUser/DatabaseGrant/clusters, credential_ref pointing at OpenBao paths (never secret values).

Wire tofu-mariadb / tofu-postgres to read the REST contract for install+config+HA, and drive logical DB/user/grant CRUD via the composed cyrilgdn/postgresql + petoju/mysql providers with the password resolved from credential_ref at apply time.
